testcase.name: Board size selection - Easy/Small mode
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Easy/Small mode &amp#27;[90m# features/board_size_selection.feature:5&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe menu is presented&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theMenuIsPresented()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI select the small board&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.iSelectTheSmallBoard()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe board should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m9&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mx&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m9&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m10&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m mines&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theBoardShouldBe(int,int,int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Board size selection - Medium mode
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Medium mode &amp#27;[90m# features/board_size_selection.feature:10&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe menu is presented&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theMenuIsPresented()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI select the medium board&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.iSelectTheMediumBoard()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe board should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m16&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mx&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m16&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m40&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m mines&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theBoardShouldBe(int,int,int)&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: Board size selection - Hard/Large mode
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Hard/Large mode &amp#27;[90m# features/board_size_selection.feature:15&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mGiven &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe menu is presented&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theMenuIsPresented()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI select the large board&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.iSelectTheLargeBoard()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mthe board should be &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m30&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mx&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m16&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m with &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m99&amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m mines&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# minesweeper.stepdefinitions.BoardSizeSteps.theBoardShouldBe(int,int,int)&amp#27;[0m
